payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a lower dark mahogany wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and glossy finish, showing scuffing and wear along the base and a right edge that is cropped by the image border; approximate distance ~0.6 m from the camera.
